title: ATM Custom Recipes
description: This DataPack add some recipes that aren't in the Allthemodium mod.
body:
Requires this mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/allthemodium

This DataPack add some recipes that aren't in the Allthemodium mod when you don't have the entire modpack, this is useful in case that you just want the Allthemodium mod
